title: habenaria digitata var. travancorica
intro: Habenaria digitata var. travancorica is an orchid plant species found in the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Habenaria digitata var. travancorica include its use as an anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
